next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/listmonk-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record when using a public hostname.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT upstream (http://<ct-ip>:9000).
Log in to Listmonk with listmonk.admin_user and the vault admin password.
Configure SMTP in Admin -> Settings -> SMTP when mail.enabled is false in config.
Keep HDC_LISTMONK_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing it makes the Postgres volume unrecoverable.
